sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Wedbush bullish on Black Diamond Therapeutics (BDTX) following progress in Silevertinib program
feed.summary: Wedbush has reiterated its Outperform rating and $18 price target for Black Diamond Therapeutics (BDTX). This positive outlook follows recent progress and positive updates on the company's Silevertinib program, indicating potential for the drug's development.

feed.title: Beam Therapeutics shares climb after positive BEAM-302 trial update
feed.summary: NULL

feed.title: AXIA Energia Selects ANDRITZ to Modernize Itumbiara Hydropower Plant in Brazil
feed.summary: AXIA Energia has contracted ANDRITZ for a significant automation modernization project at Brazil's Itumbiara hydropower plant, one of the country's largest. The project, valued in the lower double-digit million-euro range, will upgrade the plant's protection, control, and supervision systems, as well as mechanical components, to enhance operational reliability, safety, and efficiency. This modernization will incorporate advanced digital technologies, including ANDRITZ’s HIPASE platform and robust cybersecurity, to ensure the plant's long-term energy efficiency and sustainability.

feed.title: Freedom Broker Downgrades ASML Holding N.V. (ASML) to ‘Hold’ Following Q2 Results
feed.summary: Freedom Broker has downgraded ASML Holding N.V. (ASML) to a 'Hold' rating after the company released its Q2 financial results. The downgrade reflects Freedom Broker's updated assessment of ASML's stock performance and future outlook. Investors are advised to consider this new rating in light of the semiconductor equipment manufacturer's latest earnings report.

feed.title: Revvity Inc. stock faces pressure amid life sciences sector slowdown as Q4 earnings loom
feed.summary: Revvity Inc. is facing pressure due to a slowdown in the life sciences sector, marked by reduced research funding and biopharma spending cuts, which led to flat Q4 revenue and organic declines. US investors should monitor the upcoming Q4 results for insights into NIH funding impacts, biopharma R&D recovery, and the integration of acquisitions like BioLegend, especially given the company's significant US customer base and the resilience of its diagnostics segment. Despite sector headwinds, the company's services business provides stability, while its valuation and strategic acquisitions offer potential upside for growth-seeking investors.

feed.title: United Rentals Inc. stock faces scrutiny amid US construction slowdown signals and competitor warnin
feed.summary: United Rentals Inc. (URI) stock is under scrutiny due to signals of a potential US construction slowdown and cautious warnings from competitor Ashtead Group. Despite URI's strong pricing power, softened rental volumes and high borrowing costs are raising concerns ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report. The article highlights URI's role as a key indicator for industrial demand and infrastructure spending, noting its financial resilience while acknowledging risks from market shifts and interest rates.

feed.title: MetLife Inc. stock faces pressure amid rising catastrophe claims and interest rate uncertainty in Q1
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. is facing pressure on its stock due to higher-than-expected catastrophe claims from recent U.S. storms, which impacted its Q1 outlook. Additionally, uncertainty around interest rate changes later in 2026 adds another layer of complexity for the insurer's investment income. Despite these challenges, MetLife's strong balance sheet, historical dividend increases, and global diversification are expected to help it navigate current market conditions, making it a balanced risk-reward option for U.S. investors.

feed.title: Atmos Energy Corp. stock faces analyst scrutiny amid FY 2026 guidance and institutional shifts
feed.summary: Atmos Energy Corp. (NYSE: ATO) is drawing investor attention due to recent institutional buying, including a $1.29 million stake from Pensionfund Sabic, and reaffirmed FY 2026 EPS guidance of $8.15-$8.35. While analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus with an average price target of $170.44, indicating potential modest downside, the company's dividend profile and regulated natural gas distribution model appeal to US investors seeking stability in uncertain markets. The article highlights the firm's resilience, strategic positioning, and the balance of risks and rewards in its defensive sector.

feed.title: Intuit Inc. stock surges on AI-driven growth and robust financial software demand
feed.summary: Intuit Inc. is experiencing a surge in stock value driven by its extensive integration of AI across products like QuickBooks and TurboTax, enhancing user adoption and revenue. The company maintains high customer retention rates, cementing its competitive position in the fintech sector for small businesses while also expanding into international markets. This AI-driven growth and market diversification make Intuit an appealing option for US investors seeking resilient enterprise software plays.

feed.title: AFLAC Inc. stock gains amid spring budgeting push and steady S&P 500 performance as insurers eye renewal season
feed.summary: AFLAC Inc. shares rose 0.56% to 106.79 CHF on March 25, 2026, demonstrating resilience in the supplemental insurance market. This gain coincides with AFLAC's "Spring Cleaning Your Budget" initiative, aimed at aligning financial planning with increased demand for supplemental health insurance among US investors facing economic uncertainties. The company's dual market presence in the US and Japan, strong solvency, and consistent dividend history position it as a defensive play for investors.

feed.title: MGE Energy (MGEE) Gets Price Target Boost from Morgan Stanley as Utilities Show Strength
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for MGE Energy (MGEE) from $77 to $79, while reiterating an Underweight rating. This adjustment comes as regulated and diversified utilities and IPPs in North America are seeing updated price targets and showing strength, with utilities outperforming the S&P's return in February. MGE Energy's subsidiary, Madison Gas and Electric, is actively pursuing a net-zero carbon electricity goal by 2050, building on its earlier target of an 80% carbon emission reduction by the same year compared to 2005 levels.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets stock faces scrutiny amid surging exchange volumes and regulatory shifts in deri
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets is gaining investor attention due to record trading volumes driven by equity and crypto derivatives volatility. The company, a dominant player in options and futures, is navigating evolving SEC regulations on market structure while expanding into digital assets. Its strong financial health, diversified offerings, and exposure to volatility products position it uniquely for investors.

feed.title: Paycom Software Inc. stock gains momentum after top G2 Spring 2026 rankings in HR and payroll softwa
feed.summary: Paycom Software Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) has seen its stock gain momentum after securing top rankings in G2's Spring 2026 Grid Reports across several HR and payroll software categories, including HR Service Delivery and Compensation Management. These accolades, based on verified customer reviews, highlight Paycom's strong performance and customer satisfaction, reinforcing its leadership in cloud-based HCM solutions. The company's single-database architecture and AI innovations are critical drivers of its growth and market position amidst increasing enterprise demand for efficient workforce management tools.

feed.title: 12 Information Technology Stocks Moving In Wednesday's After-Market Session
feed.summary: This article identifies 12 information technology stocks that experienced significant movement in Wednesday's after-market session. It details both gainers and losers, providing their percentage change, stock price, and market capitalization. Notable movements include Focus Universal and 3 E Network seeing increases, while Hub Cyber Security and Cyngn experienced decreases.

feed.title: Apogee Therapeutics announces $377.4 million public offering of common stock
feed.summary: Apogee Therapeutics announced a public offering of 5,000,000 shares of its common stock at $70.00 per share, with underwriters fully exercising an option for an additional 750,000 shares, resulting in an expected net proceeds of approximately $377.4 million. The company, which already holds more cash than debt and has a strong current ratio, has also recently seen positive Phase II clinical trial results for its drug zumilokibart, leading to varied analyst ratings and price targets.

feed.title: LA Times Studios and Amaze to Launch Food Channel LA, a Next-Generation Creator-led Commerce Platform
feed.summary: LA Times Studios and Amaze Holdings, Inc. are partnering to launch Food Channel LA, a creator-led commerce platform focused on live shopping, creator programming, and direct-to-consumer product experiences. This initiative marks LA Times Studios’ expansion into social commerce, leveraging its brand authority and audience alongside Amaze's commerce engine and Contend's operating studio model. Food Channel LA aims to integrate live programming, product drops, and cultural storytelling into transactions, with initial activations scheduled for May 2026.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation stock faces headwinds amid gold price volatility and operational hurdles in Q1 2
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation, the world's leading gold miner, is experiencing production shortfalls and cost pressures due to fluctuating gold prices and operational hurdles in Q1 2026, with an unexpected dip in production at key mines. The company's stock has faced a selloff, and while the Newcrest acquisition has created synergies, integration challenges persist. Investors are watching Newmont's dividend sustainability and progress in cost discipline as it navigates a volatile market and aims for long-term growth and diversification.

feed.title: Insurance moves: AXA XL and Aegon
feed.summary: The article details recent leadership changes within the insurance industry. AXA XL has appointed Michael Reynolds as head of marine, UK & Lloyd's, and global chief underwriting officer for hull. Additionally, Aegon has nominated Marco Keim to the supervisory board of Dutch insurer a.s.r., taking over from Aegon CEO Lard Friese.

feed.title: Carrier Global Corp. stock faces pressure amid slowing demand and market uncertainty in HVAC sector
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corp. (ISIN: US1442851009) is experiencing stock pressure due to slowing demand in residential and commercial HVAC markets. Despite near-term headwinds from economic cooling and high interest rates affecting construction, the company is positioned for long-term growth through its focus on sustainable technologies and energy-efficient solutions. Investors are watching for signs of recovery as the company navigates cyclical demand challenges and leverages its diverse segments and strong balance sheet.

feed.title: Realty Income secures USD 694 million term loan maturing in 2036
feed.summary: Realty Income Corp has successfully secured a USD 694 million term loan set to mature in 2036. This financing move is designed to strengthen the company's balance sheet and support its long-term capital management and investment strategies. It provides additional financial flexibility, diversifies funding sources, and extends the company's maturity profile to reduce near-term refinancing pressures.

feed.title: Allegion plc stock gains spotlight with 2026 Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award win amid industrials
feed.summary: Allegion plc has won the 2026 Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award with Distinction, recognizing its leadership in employee engagement within the competitive security products market. This achievement is particularly significant for US investors, as it signals Allegion's operational resilience and its ability to attract and retain talent in a tightening labor market, reinforcing its long-term growth potential and efficiency in the industrials sector. The award highlights the company's strong employee-centric culture, which translates into higher profitability and reduced turnover, making it an attractive prospect for investors seeking resilient industrials plays.

feed.title: Steris plc stock faces scrutiny amid healthcare sector pressures and proxy season buildup
feed.summary: Steris plc, a leader in infection prevention and sterilization, is facing scrutiny as proxy season approaches, navigating a challenging healthcare environment. US investors are closely watching the company's resilient margins and US market dominance, despite macroeconomic uncertainties. The company's diversified business model, including healthcare, applied sterilization technologies, and life sciences, positions it for long-term resilience and steady top-line expansion.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group stock faces headwinds from rising interest rates and regulatory scrutiny in Midwest
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group (WEC) faces challenges including rising interest rates, regulatory scrutiny, and project execution risks despite strong demand from data centers and a commitment to carbon-free generation by 2035. The utility's 2026 guidance suggests slower growth, and while it maintains a strong balance sheet for dividends, analysts note risks from supply chain delays and potential regulatory pushback on rate increases. Investors are advised to consider the company's long-term strategy for renewables and its Midwest market insulation.

feed.title: Westinghouse Air stock faces uncertainty amid Wabtec Corp integration and freight demand slowdown
feed.summary: The Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies stock, now part of Wabtec Corp, is experiencing uncertainty due to softening freight volumes and operational pressures in the rail sector. While overall order intake is down, resilient aftermarket services, particularly for its braking technologies, offer a buffer. US investors are advised to monitor infrastructure spending and persistent supply chain issues that could impact future performance.

feed.title: Alta Equipment (ALTG) CFO awarded 11,654 performance stock units
feed.summary: Anthony Colucci, CFO of Alta Equipment Group Inc. (ALTG), was granted 11,654 performance stock units (PSUs) as part of his equity compensation. These PSUs, which represent the right to receive one common share each, were earned on February 27, 2026, and will vest annually over two years starting February 14, 2027, contingent on his continued employment. This award, stemming from the company's 2020 Omnibus Incentive Plan, is a compensation-related grant aimed at retention and aligning his interests with future company performance rather than an open-market transaction.

feed.title: AAR Corp. price target raised to $125 from $105 at RBC Capital
feed.summary: RBC Capital has increased its price target for AAR Corp. (AIR) to $125 from $105, maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment follows AAR Corp.'s strong Q3 results, which exceeded RBC Capital's revenue and EBITDA margin expectations. The company also demonstrated broad-based strength with significant commercial and government sales growth.

feed.title: Avantis Core Municipal Fixed Income ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.1456
feed.summary: The Avantis Core Municipal Fixed Income ETF (NYSEARCA:AVMU) has announced a monthly distribution of $0.1456 per share. This declaration provides investors with a clear understanding of the expected income from their holdings in the fund for the upcoming period.

feed.title: ZKP SEC Filings - Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp IA 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filings for Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I (ZKP), a blank check company. It details how investors can review regulatory documents like 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly earnings, and 8-K material events. The company's recent 10-K filing outlines its $287.5M SPAC trust, its focus on technology industry target businesses for an initial business combination, and its financial status as a "shell" company.

feed.title: Planned sale: Yelp (NYSE: YELP) CFO trades 7,500 shares
feed.summary: Yelp Inc.'s Chief Financial Officer, David A. Schwarzbach, reported the sale of 7,500 shares of common stock at $25.00 per share. This transaction was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on August 14, 2025. Following the sale, Schwarzbach directly holds 216,800 shares of Yelp.

feed.title: TeraWulf Inc (WULF) Shares Up 4.25% on Mar 25
feed.summary: Shares of TeraWulf Inc (WULF) rose 4.25% on March 25, reaching an intraday high of $17.75 before closing at $16.91. This places the stock 8.64% below its 52-week high and significantly above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $24.95, implying a 47.52% upside, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $12.96, suggesting a potential downside.

feed.title: Wolverine Worldwide Stock Analysis: 41% Decline, Revenue Stagnation, and Future Outlook - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Wolverine Worldwide's stock has declined significantly by 41.3% over the past six months, reaching $16.65 per share. The company faces concerns regarding business quality due to stagnated sales, with current revenues similar to those five years ago, despite some earnings per share growth. Analysts suggest avoiding the stock as its valuation offers limited upside compared to potential downside risks.

feed.title: BRIEF-X Financial Q4 Revenue RMB 1,467.843 Million
feed.summary: X Financial reported its Q4 revenue as RMB 1,467.843 Million. The brief news item indicates this financial update comes from Reuters and is a quick read, falling under Chinese stocks and earnings categories.

feed.title: Yum! Brands Inc. stock surges on KFC's innovative US bucket meal launch amid fast-food recovery push
feed.summary: Yum! Brands Inc. saw its stock climb 4% pre-market following KFC's announcement of a new line of bucket meals in the U.S., designed to cater to evolving consumer trends and recapture market share. This strategic move aims to boost same-store sales and traffic in a competitive fast-food landscape where value and affordability are key, especially given KFC's significant contribution to Yum!'s overall revenue. The market reacted positively, interpreting the innovation as a timely adaptation to consumer demand for affordable options and a potential catalyst for improved earnings.

feed.title: Detroit woman pleads guilty to Ulta Beauty theft ring
feed.summary: A Detroit woman has pleaded guilty to organizing a theft ring that targeted Ulta Beauty stores in Metro Detroit. The plea was announced by the Michigan Attorney General's office.

feed.title: Deere & Co. stock faces pressure amid softening agricultural demand and recent market dip
feed.summary: Deere & Co. (DE) stock closed down 0.86% on March 25, 2026, amid concerns about softening agricultural demand and a 7.32% drop over the past month. Despite strong year-to-date gains and analyst optimism with a target of $652.97, the company faces pressure as farmer spending slows. Deere's focus on precision agriculture and its diversified business segments are key to navigating market volatility.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy Inc. stock stands out as top dividend pick amid utilities sector strength and ste
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy Inc. (ISIN: US15189T1079) is highlighted as a compelling dividend pick for income-focused US investors due to its 2.2% dividend yield, consistent growth, and projected 8.52% EPS growth for 2026. The Houston-based energy delivery company offers stability in the volatile energy sector, distinguishing itself with reliable cash flow generation and strategic positioning in infrastructure investments. Despite potential risks from regulatory scrutiny and interest rates, its strong earnings outlook and year-to-date performance make it an attractive option for portfolio diversification.

feed.title: Why Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) Is Down 5.5% After Fortnite Weakness And ETF Spotlight And What's Next
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) shares dropped 5.5% after Epic Games announced layoffs due to decreased Fortnite engagement, raising concerns about the wider video game market. Despite this, Take-Two is a top holding in JPMorgan's U.S. Tech Leaders ETF, indicating some fund managers still see it as a key player in gaming and AI. The article explores how these diverging views influence Take-Two's investment outlook, emphasizing the importance of upcoming releases and cost control while acknowledging risks in player engagement and profitability.

feed.title: Is Becton Dickinson (BDX) Pricing Reflect Its DCF And P/E Signals After Recent Share Pullback
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BDX) has experienced a significant share pullback, leading investors to question its true valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 28.0% with an intrinsic value of $219.87 per share. Additionally, its current P/E ratio of 25.65x is below both the medical equipment industry average and Simply Wall St's proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 30.95x, further indicating undervaluation.

feed.title: Hershey Company Stock Faces Pressure from Trust Sale and Restructuring Amid Consumer Shifts
feed.summary: The Hershey Company is undergoing significant changes, including a $4.3 million share sale by its largest shareholder, Hershey Trust Co, and a major internal restructuring into a "ONE Hershey" strategy. These developments occur as the company navigates challenges like pricing pressures, consumer shifts towards functional treats, and volatile cocoa costs. Investors are closely watching how the restructuring and new leadership will impact future margins and growth in the competitive consumer staples market.

feed.title: Expedia Group Inc. stock dips 0.6% to $235.46 on Nasdaq amid late trading pressure as Q1 earnings lo
feed.summary: Expedia Group Inc. stock dipped 0.6% to $235.46 on Nasdaq, closing lower amid late trading pressure. The decline comes as investors anticipate the company's Q1 2026 earnings release on April 30, with the stock currently 28.89% below its 52-week high, presenting a unique opportunity for value-oriented investors in the travel industry. Analyst forecasts for the full year 2026 earnings per share are set at $19.24, with a projected dividend of $1.45 for the current year.

feed.title: VIASP.PFD (Via Renewables) PB Ratio : (As of Mar. 25, 2026)
feed.summary: This article provides details on Via Renewables' (VIASP.PFD) Price-to-Book (PB) Ratio as of March 25, 2026. It calculates the current PB Ratio, presents its historical range over the past 10-12 years, and explains how to interpret the ratio in the context of the Utilities - Regulated industry. The article also includes Via Renewables' business description and recent headlines.

feed.title: Twin Vee PowerCats Announces Public Equity Offering Completion
feed.summary: Twin Vee PowerCats successfully completed a public equity offering in March 2026, raising approximately $2.5 million in gross proceeds. The funds will primarily be used for working capital and general corporate purposes. The offering included lock-up agreements for the company and insiders, and ThinkEquity received compensation including cash fees, expense allowances, and placement agent warrants.

feed.title: Former Foot Locker CEO joins American Airlines' board
feed.summary: Mary Dillon, formerly CEO of Foot Locker and Ulta Beauty, has been appointed to American Airlines' board of directors. American CEO Robert Isom praised Dillon as a "tremendous leader." The Dallas Business Journal reported the announcement on March 25, 2026.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Corp. stock faces dividend uncertainty amid regulatory scrutiny and energy sector shifts
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. is navigating challenges from past regulatory issues and current market pressures, impacting dividend sustainability and grid modernization efforts. The company maintained its dividend policy despite high capital expenditures for grid upgrades, aligning with peers prioritizing dividend growth. Regulatory changes and investments in smart grid technology position FirstEnergy to capture growing demand from data centers, with analysts noting reduced legal overhangs.

feed.title: Whirlpool Corp. stock faces renewed pressure amid slowing appliance demand and tariff uncertainties
feed.summary: Whirlpool Corp. stock is under renewed pressure due to slowing appliance demand, particularly in North America, amidst a challenging housing market with high interest rates. The company is also grappling with persistent supply chain issues and potential tariff uncertainties, although strategic moves like portfolio optimization and focus on energy-efficient products aim to position it for future recovery. US investors should monitor Q1 earnings on April 23 for clarity on guidance and margin trajectory.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group stock faces valuation scrutiny amid strong 2025 results and 2026 cost pressure
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group's stock is under scrutiny despite strong 2025 earnings and firm 2026 guidance, trading at $273.39 on the NYSE. Investors are weighing concerns like rising fuel costs, significant debt maturities in 2026, and planned capital expenditures, leading some hedge funds to reduce their positions. The company's future stock performance will largely depend on its ability to manage these operational costs and execute its 2026 outlook amidst industry-wide pressures.

feed.title: NiSource Inc. stock faces regulatory scrutiny amid Midwest utility rate hikes and $5.3B capex push
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. is facing regulatory scrutiny in the Midwest as it seeks rate increases to fund a significant $5.3 billion capital expenditure plan for 2026. The utility's proposed rate hikes, aimed at supporting grid upgrades and clean energy transitions, are encountering pushback from state commissions concerned about ratepayer affordability. Investors are closely watching these regulatory outcomes as they will impact NiSource's earnings stability and its ability to maintain its dividend growth track record.

feed.title: Albemarle Corp. stock rises on Chile lithium project review and credit amendment amid EV battery demand surge
feed.summary: Albemarle Corp. (NYSE: ALB), the world's largest lithium producer, saw its stock rise over 3% this week after launching an environmental review for its first Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) project in Chile and amending its credit agreement. These developments position Albemarle to meet an accelerating demand for lithium, crucial for electric vehicle batteries, with DLE technology promising more efficient extraction. Investors are closely watching these moves as global EV sales hit record highs and the US seeks to strengthen its domestic EV supply chain, reducing reliance on foreign sources.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial stock hits record client assets milestone amid strong February operating dat
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial reported record client assets under administration of $1.83 trillion for February 2026, marking a 16% year-over-year increase, driven by higher equity markets and net asset inflows. The firm's Private Client Group and fee-based accounts showed significant growth, while its banking segment remained stable, and investment banking pipelines robust. This performance highlights Raymond James' strength as a diversified financial services provider with an advisor-centric approach.

feed.title: Rollins Inc. stock faces viral hype as premium robots target pest control sector disruption
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. is experiencing viral attention as premium robots are poised to disrupt the pest control sector. Online discussions have labeled Rollins Inc. a "viral secret tip," attracting US investors seeking opportunities in this stable industry facing technological innovation. The company, a leader in pest management, is being watched for how it will adapt to or integrate automation, particularly with advanced robots entering commercial pilot stages.
